title: Thala Kaalu Puriyala Lyrics Pattathu Yaanai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Thala kaalu puriyavilla
Singer: Shankar Mahadevan, Suchitra
Movie: Pattathu Yaanai
Music: Thaman S
Lyrics: Annamalai		 .

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Thala kaalu puriyavilla de
kaalu tharamela nadakavilla de
pagal iravu theriyavilla da
en mayakathuku marundhu solluda

ye goli soda naan vaangi thaaren
vaadi oothikalaam
Kedi billa killadi ranga
vaada kattikalaam

Selathil kaaikira maabalam maambalam
saapida venumey vaangithaade
Thai maasam naayanam oodhanum
oodhanum takkunu ponnu ne
kettu vaada ....(Thala kaalu)

Gummunu neethaan nikkura pulla
kooputtaa gammunu varamaatura
Thanjaavur bomma naanthaanda ippo
nee enna sonnaalum thalayaaturen

Un kendakaal azhagulathaan
en manda naan udayuren de
ada vendaanda dagulu
ippa nee nagaru
oru thaaliya potadhum
nee oodhu bigilu.. (Selathil kaaikira )

Poochaandi pola bayam kaatum kannu
aaathaadi en nenja pandhaadudhu
Thazhpaala pottu naan pootinaalum
alayellaam unnaala koothaadudhu

Adi kandaangi nee kattura
enna thundaaki nee pogura
ada venaamey kobam
nee kelu thaaren
ini unnodu kai korthu
onnaagave vazhuren

Selathil kaaikira maabalam maambalam
saapida venumey vaangithaade
Thai maasam naayanam oodhanum
oodhanum takkunu ponnu ne
kettu vaadaEnglish Translation

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Thala Kaalu Puriyala conveys a sense of carefree joy and celebration, reflecting the fun and lively spirit of the characters in Pattathu Yaanai.

What is the plot context of the movie?

Pattathu Yaanai revolves around themes of love and adventure, where this song adds to the festive atmosphere of the narrative.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Shankar Mahadevan and Suchitra, bringing a unique blend of energy to the track.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Thala Kaalu Puriyala was composed by Thaman S, known for his catchy and vibrant compositions.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 24, 2013, as part of the movie Pattathu Yaanai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thala Kaalu Puriyala, the lively duet captures the essence of celebration and joy, perfectly aligning with the festive moments in Pattathu Yaanai. The energetic vocals of Shankar Mahadevan and Suchitra create an infectious vibe that resonates with audiences. The song conveys a carefree spirit, encouraging listeners to embrace happiness and dance along. Its upbeat rhythm and catchy lyrics make it an ideal choice for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thala Kaalu Puriyala from Pattathu Yaanai is a vibrant celebration of energy and rhythm, featuring the dynamic vocals of Shankar Mahadevan and Suchitra. This catchy duet, composed by Thaman S, perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. Get ready to groove as this song takes you on a joyful musical journey!
stanzaMeanings: The head doesn't understand, the legs don't move, day and night are unclear, tell me the medicine for my confusion.
I will buy a soda and give it to you, we can have fun together. Let's play and enjoy.
Your eyes are like a beautiful gaze that captivates me.
In the streets, there is a need to eat well, especially during the month of Thai. The girl who walks gracefully, come and join us.
You are the one who stands out, but you don't come close. I am from Thanjavur, and whatever you say, I will keep my head high.
Your beautiful legs are mine, I will take care of you. Now you are laughing, even if you wear a ring, you will still dance.
Like a cat, fear shows in your eyes, my heart is troubled. Even if I put a flower on my head, everything dances because of you.
When you look at me, you become my treasure, and when you leave, I feel sad. You will hear my anger, but I will stay with you.
In the streets, there is a need to eat well, especially during the month of Thai. The girl who walks gracefully, come and join us.
